nasb.text: You shall not do any work on this same day, for it is a day of atonement, to make atonement on your behalf before the Lord your God.

esv.text: And you shall not do any work on that very day, for it is a Day of Atonement, to make atonement for you before the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 在這一天，甚麼工你們都不可作，因為這是贖罪日，要在耶和華你們的　神面前為你們贖罪。

ccb.text: 那是在你们的上帝耶和华面前为自己赎罪的日子，你们不可工作。
